race.comment: WHATYOUTALKINBOUT (3) jumped the odds-on favourite here 22 days ago and pulled up with an issue when disappointing. Drawn out now which is a query, but he has early speed and he showed plenty of talent in his debut campaign. Can bounce back quickly now. BONDI'S SON (12) flew home last start to just miss by 1.4L at this track and drops back to 1300m today. He's placed in both attempts over this course and distance and Riordan sticks from his last start effort. Can play a leading role. SPANGLEDSTAR (10) was too good last start when running on from midfield to win by 1.3L in a strong performance. A better draw this time helps and there's no reason why she can't go on with the job. GUARD THE MULLAH (1) is ticking along nicely and has the speed to offset the wide draw. Can feature in the finish. BUON AMICI (4) won't be far away third-up into the campaign.
